# Stvor SDK

> End-to-end encryption for any app. Drop-in library — no cryptography knowledge required.

Stvor SDK implements the Signal Protocol (X3DH + Double Ratchet) with AES-256-GCM, ECDSA P-256, and HKDF-SHA-256. Zero runtime dependencies — Node.js uses `node:crypto`, browsers use Web Crypto API.

## Install

```bash
npm install @stvor/sdk
```

## Quickstart (Node.js)

```ts
import { Stvor } from '@stvor/sdk';

const alice = await Stvor.connect({
  userId:   'alice',
  appToken: 'stvor_live_xxx',
  relayUrl: 'https://relay.stvor.xyz',
});

const bob = await Stvor.connect({
  userId:   'bob',
  appToken: 'stvor_live_xxx',
  relayUrl: 'https://relay.stvor.xyz',
});

bob.onMessage(msg => {
  console.log(`From ${msg.from}:`, msg.data);
});

await alice.send('bob', { text: 'Hello!' });

await alice.disconnect();
await bob.disconnect();
```

## Quickstart (Browser)

```ts
import { StvorWebSDK } from '@stvor/sdk/web';

const sdk = await StvorWebSDK.create({
  userId:   'alice',
  appToken: 'stvor_live_xxx',
  relayUrl: 'https://relay.stvor.xyz',
});

sdk.onMessage((from, data) => console.log(from, data));
await sdk.send('bob', { text: 'Hello from browser!' });
sdk.disconnect();
```

## Local Development

```bash
npx @stvor/sdk mock-relay
```

Then use `relayUrl: 'http://localhost:4444'` — no account needed.

## API — Stvor.connect(config)

```ts
const client = await Stvor.connect({
  userId:          string,   // any unique identifier
  appToken:        string,   // must start with 'stvor_'
  relayUrl:        string,   // 'https://relay.stvor.xyz' or self-hosted
  timeout?:        number,   // ms, default: 10000
  pollIntervalMs?: number,   // polling interval, default: 1000
});
```

## API — client.send(recipientId, data, options?)

Sends any JavaScript value. Type is preserved on the receiving end.

```ts
await client.send('bob', 'Hello');
await client.send('bob', { amount: 100, currency: 'USD' });
await client.send('bob', Buffer.from([1, 2, 3]));
await client.send('bob', new Date());
await client.send('bob', 'Hey', { timeout: 30_000 });
await client.send('bob', 'Hey', { waitForRecipient: false });
```

## API — client.onMessage(handler)

```ts
const unsubscribe = client.onMessage(msg => {
  // msg.from      — sender userId
  // msg.data      — decrypted value (original type preserved)
  // msg.timestamp — Date
  // msg.id        — unique string
});

unsubscribe(); // stop listening
```

## API — client.waitForUser(userId, timeoutMs?)

```ts
const online = await client.waitForUser('bob', 15_000);
// true = registered, false = timeout
```

## API — client.disconnect()

```ts
await client.disconnect();
```

## Supported Data Types

| Type | Example |
|------|---------|
| string | 'Hello' |
| number | 42, 3.14 |
| boolean | true, false |
| null | null |
| Uint8Array / Buffer | Binary files, images |
| object / array | { key: 'val' }, [1,2,3] |
| Date | new Date() |
| Set | new Set([1,2,3]) |
| Map | new Map([['a',1]]) |

## Security Properties

- **Forward Secrecy** — Double Ratchet generates a new key per message
- **Post-Compromise Security** — DH ratchet rotation every message
- **Replay protection** — Nonce + timestamp validation per message
- **TOFU** — Trust On First Use identity binding; throws on key change
- **Zero-knowledge relay** — server only ever sees ciphertext
- **Simultaneous send** — both sides can send before receiving

## Relay Options

### Hosted (recommended)
```ts
relayUrl: 'https://relay.stvor.xyz'
```
No setup. Accepts any `stvor_*` token.

### Local (development)
```bash
npx @stvor/sdk mock-relay          # port 4444
PORT=9000 npx @stvor/sdk mock-relay
```

### Self-hosted
```bash
git clone https://github.com/sapogeth/sdk-relay
node server.js
```

## How It Works

1. Each user generates an ECDH P-256 identity key pair on first connect.
2. X3DH key agreement — both sides derive the same shared secret without the server seeing it.
3. Double Ratchet — every message advances the ratchet; compromise of one key exposes nothing else.
4. The relay server stores and forwards only ciphertext. It never sees plaintext or keys.

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@stvor/sdk
- Docs: https://sdk.stvor.xyz/docs
- GitHub (relay): https://github.com/sapogeth/sdk-relay
- Hosted relay: https://relay.stvor.xyz
